changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Treat missing or blank SEARCH_WORD as no keyword condition. DynamicSqlService fills absent params with NULL; without this guard the ILIKE comparisons evaluate to NULL and match no tracks.

update.column: SELECT id, activity_type as grp FROM gps_track gt WHERE ( NULLIF(BTRIM(:SEARCH_WORD), '') IS NULL OR meta_name ILIKE '%' || BTRIM(:SEARCH_WORD) || '%' OR meta_description ILIKE '%' || BTRIM(:SEARCH_WORD) || '%' OR track_name ILIKE '%' || BTRIM(:SEARCH_WORD) || '%' OR track_description ILIKE '%' || BTRIM(:SEARCH_WORD) || '%' ) -- include the standard query filter with the condition below AND id = ANY( select id from ( [[~{/GPS_TRACK/SmartBaseFilter}]] )) ORDER BY start_date
